_comment: PORTFOLIO DATA - Easy to scale! Just copy-paste templates below to add more

brand._comment: Site branding - customize the logo/name shown in navigation
brand.name: NERMANA CO.

personal._comment: Your basic info - all fields are optional, leave blank to hide from UI. For image: use URL (https://...) or local path (/image.png). Leave blank for placeholder.
personal.name: KENT ASNA
personal.title: KENT ASNA
personal.subtitle: Detail-oriented BSIT undergraduate with hands-on experience in mobile app development, AI data labeling, and community system management. Skilled in building practical tech solutions, automating workflows, and contributing to AI training pipelines. Seeking an entry-level role in software development, data, or AI operations.

hero._comment: Hero section tagline and stats - leave stats blank to hide them
hero.tagline: Building practical tech solutions, automating workflows, and contributing to AI training pipelines. Ready to deploy code and deliver results.

social._comment: Social media links - add your usernames here (just the username, not full URL)

projects._comment: PROJECTS ARRAY - Copy the template below to add more projects. For image: use URL (https://...), local path (/image.png), or leave blank for stock image.

_template.title: PROJECT_NAME
_template.description: Brief description of what the project does and your role.

items.title: SAN VICENTE DEATH AID APP
items.description: Custom mobile app built with Flutter and Supabase to encode payment transactions, track member status, and monitor penalties for a volunteer-run community organization.

items.title: AI IMAGE RATING PIPELINE
items.description: Contributed to machine learning model training by labeling and rating AI-generated images with high accuracy and consistency within tight turnaround timelines.

items.title: AI TRAINING DATA PREP
items.description: Prepared and structured AI training data in the form of PowerPoint presentations for mock project pipelines, ensuring data quality and relevance.

skills._comment: SKILLS ARRAY - Copy template to add more skills (level 0-100)

experience._comment: EXPERIENCE ARRAY - Copy template to add more work experience

_template.title: Job Title
_template.date: Month YYYY — Month YYYY or PRESENT

items.title: Volunteer Assistant Secretary
items.description: Issued handwritten receipts to members and developed a custom mobile app using Flutter and Supabase to encode payment transactions, track member status, and monitor penalties. Managed dual manual and digital record-keeping systems.

items.title: AI Image Labeler / Rater
items.description: Labeled and rated AI-generated images to support machine learning model training. Maintained accuracy and consistency in data annotation tasks within tight turnaround timelines.

items.title: AI Data Provider
items.description: Prepared and structured AI training data in the form of PowerPoint presentations for mock project pipelines. Ensured data quality and relevance aligned with project requirements.

_quick_guide.add_project: 1. Copy _template from projects 2. Paste in projects.items array 3. Update values 4. Increment id (_004, _005, etc.)
_quick_guide.add_experience: 1. Copy _template from experience 2. Paste in experience.items array 3. Fill in your job details
_quick_guide.add_skill: 1. Copy _template from skills 2. Paste in skills.items array 3. Set name and level (0-100)
_quick_guide.hide_section: Set items to [] (empty array) or remove the section entirely
_quick_guide.optional_fields: All fields are optional - leave blank or remove to hide from UI
